downstream_dependencies: Request passengers; guardian/payer/contact semantics; portal access
reason: Governed association exists, but duplicate relationship representations and no operational timeline/workflow remain.

state_owner: TravelRequest plus RequestPassenger snapshot and RequestPassengerSegmentService scope
queue: Eventual AgentWorkQueueService sync to operational_work_items; not atomic
workflow: No workflow created in builder transaction
document_record: No artifact; request snapshots persist intake truth
downstream_dependencies: Request-trip conversion; services; offer; triage/SLA; portal
reason: Passenger intake works, but queue and workflow can lag the request transaction.

state_owner: RequestTripConversionRun and RequestTripEntityMapping; TripDossier becomes target owner
transition_collections: request_trip_conversion_plans; request_trip_conversion_runs; request_trip_entity_mappings; request_trip_conversion_issues; trip_dossiers; trip_passengers; trip_segments; trip_service_items
audit_trail: audit_events: trip_created_from_request; actor/source/result snapshots on conversion run
downstream_dependencies: Offers; booking; services; documents; tasks; deadlines
reason: Dedicated guarded, mapped, idempotent handoff with operational evidence.

state_owner: OfferWorkspace and option/routing/segment/fare/pricing children; overlapping OfferWorkspaceV2
transition_collections: offer_workspaces; offer_options; offer_routing_options; offer_segments; offer_fare_bundles; offer_pricing_lines
downstream_dependencies: Comparison; recommendation; pricing; acceptance; booking readiness
reason: Usable operator handoff, but overlapping models and no timeline/workflow progression.

state_owner: OfferAcceptance plus frozen accepted snapshot; BookingReadinessPackage; OfferBookingHandoff; BookingWorkspace/BookingRecord
transition_collections: offer_acceptances; trip_accepted_offer_snapshots; booking_readiness_packages; offer_booking_handoffs; offer_booking_handoff_checks; offer_booking_handoff_mappings; booking_execution_instructions; booking_workspaces; booking_records
audit_trail: audit_events: offer_acceptance.accepted; partial actor/snapshot evidence for handoff mutations
document_record: No artifact; document references are readiness inputs
downstream_dependencies: Booking/import; tickets; EMDs; payments; services; documents
reason: Strong frozen-snapshot handoff, but direct from-readiness booking path can bypass canonical handoff records.

state_owner: TicketRecord and TicketCoupon; overlapping TicketWorkspace; source split across Booking/BookingRecord/BookingWorkspace
transition_collections: ticket_records; ticket_coupons; source bookings or booking_records; overlapping ticket_workspaces
audit_trail: No shared audit_events entry on legacy record-ticket action; actor fields only
timeline: booking_timeline_events: booking.ticket_recorded; ticket_emd_timeline_events on newer path
document_record: Ticket receipt can be rendered later; not required at handoff
downstream_dependencies: Coupons; EMDs; documents; readiness; finance; after sales
reason: Agent can record an externally issued ticket, but ownership and trace are fragmented and provider truth is not reconciled.

state_owner: No transition owner; PassengerServiceRequest and SsrOsiWorkspace independently own service state
transition_api: None; service APIs originate from request/trip or parsed booking PNR
transition_ui: None; PassengerServicesPage.jsx is read-only and ticket pages have no service action
transition_collections: None; ticket and service collections only share optional context
workflow: PassengerServiceWorkflow may reference both independently but records no transition
downstream_dependencies: Airline approval; SSR/OSI; EMD; service documents; airport handling; travel readiness
reason: No ticket-driven transition exists, and passenger service requirements operationally begin before ticketing.

state_owner: DocumentRenderJob stores HTML/text output; separate DocumentWorkspace owns requirement/verification state and separate RenderedDocument path is not invoked
transition_ui: DocumentsPage.jsx; no direct action from PassengerServicesPage.jsx
transition_collections: document_render_jobs; optional document_packages; no rendered_documents or document_workspaces update

queue: None; missing-document work is not closed
workflow: None; service readiness is not advanced
document_record: DocumentRenderJob contains source context and rendered output but is not promoted to rendered_documents
downstream_dependencies: Packages; sharing/delivery records; trip/booking document sets; service readiness
reason: Rendering from service context works, but requires manual navigation and does not reconcile the operational document requirement.

state_owner: No transition owner; Invoice, InvoiceLineItem, and PaymentRecord independently own finance
transition_api: None; finance records are created before an invoice document may be rendered
transition_ui: None; finance UI creates records and InvoiceDetailPage.jsx may render afterward
transition_collections: None for transition; finance uses invoices, invoice_line_items, payment_records
audit_trail: None for transition; finance actions have their own audit_events
timeline: None for transition; finance actions may use booking_timeline_events
document_record: Invoice document is downstream of finance, not its source
downstream_dependencies: Balances; reconciliation; reporting; release blockers; after-sales estimates
reason: No document-to-finance handoff exists; the implemented direction is finance to rendered invoice document.

state_owner: AfterSalesCase and AfterSalesFinancialImpact, without invoice/payment mapping
transition_api: None; POST /api/agencies/{agency_id}/after-sales and /{case_id}/financial-impacts accept manual case data only
transition_ui: AfterSalesPage.jsx manual case and impact entry
transition_collections: None for transition; after_sales_cases; after_sales_case_items; after_sales_financial_impacts; after_sales_decisions; after_sales_resolutions; after_sales_communication_records
